mnemonics: PIE: Partition, Iterate, Evaluate - a slice of the algorithm pie.
RATS: Remember to Analyze Time & Space complexity for continuous integrals and sums.
keyPoints: Recurrence relations are used to analyze recursive algorithms.
The Master Theorem provides a cookbook solution for common recurrence forms.
Amortized analysis gives a worst-case average over a sequence of operations.
commonMistakes: Misapplying the Master Theorem to recurrences not in its standard forms (e.g., f(n) is not polynomial).
Forgetting to account for constant factors and lower-order terms when using asymptotic notation.
Confusing average-case analysis with amortized analysis.
